_comment: Project-level Claude Code settings. Hooks below auto-trigger the porting-self-challenge critic at major step completion / session wrap-up. See docs/_meta/SKILLS-USAGE.md §Hooks for rationale and docs/_meta/kb/challenge_patterns/ for the 11 critic patterns.

hooks.prompt: Session is ending. Run /porting-self-challenge to perform the critic self-check defined in src/skills/_shared/porting-self-challenge/SKILL.md. Take as context: this session's git log on the working branch + any [SELF-CHALLENGE FAIL] tracebacks already posted to Discord. If the 10 questions reveal a new failure mode, append a porting_lesson and a challenge_pattern before exiting.
